sections.title: Cons
sections.narration: the drawbacks next. sodium is a major drawback because a central practical health issue for bacon. processing is a major negative because a key downside now that more processed foods are in scope. rarely improves a meal much on its own because usually works more as a flavour add-on than a genuinely strong meat choice.
